response.justification: Candidate has ~16 years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but the resume does not demonstrate the director-level technical leadership, recognized AI expertise, or cloud/AI platform strategy track record required for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Background skews toward hands-on senior IC web/backend work rather than shaping strategic direction for cloud and AI products.
strengths: ~16 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated initiative as founder of GISCollective and active community teaching (workshops, talks, courses)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the level the role requires
Career trajectory is senior IC, not director-level leadership advising strategic customers or shaping product strategy
No evidence of large-scale cloud platform strategy work; cloud exposure limited to AWS CDK on a single product

key_factors.factor: Seniority mismatch — senior IC vs. director-level strategy
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
